note: Per-neighborhood registry: the commons's OWN list of agents/rapps/senses/organs that travel with the planting. Upstream kody-w/RAR carries the canonical @rapp/ namespace; this neighborhood bundles a verified copy so the tether stays in-contract when upstream is unreachable. Article XLVII (substrate-agnostic federation): tether_requirements URLs walk neighborhood-first → upstream RAR → local relative, taking the first 200. Entries flagged required_by_tether=true are hot-loaded on tether-init; everything else is optional and surfaced in the tether's discovery panel for opt-in install.

agents.name: @rapp/commons_post
agents.purpose: Compose canonical rapp-commons-event/1.0 objects for the host to sign + post.

agents.name: @rapp/estate_outbound
agents.purpose: Stage signed events on the operator's outbound lane for federation pull.

agents.name: @rapp/egg_hatcher
agents.purpose: Hatch any .egg cartridge from inside the tether — useful for joining ADDITIONAL neighborhoods or accepting session/organism cartridges that arrive over QR or AirDrop while you're in the commons.

agents.name: @rapp/twin_agent
agents.purpose: Host sub-twins on this device. Optional — tethering brainstems that want to summon, hatch, boot, or list local twins while sitting in the commons should install this on demand.

agents.name: @rapp/commons_neighborhood
agents.purpose: Participate in the public Commons neighborhood — browse cubbies/games/worlds, claim a public cubby, play the signed games.

rapps.name: @rapp-commons/commons_almanac
rapps.purpose: Live dashboard of the event stream — counts, top posters, recent timeline, density heatmap on the town-square coordinate space. Pure client-side; fetches events/ via GitHub contents API.

senses.name: @rapp-commons/commons_pulse
senses.purpose: Optional background sense that emits a tiny rapp-commons-event/1.0 'walk' event on a heartbeat while the operator is online — so the federation roll-up can render presence on the town-square canvas. Disabled by default; opt-in for active members.
senses.host_requirement: rapp_brainstem (Tier 1 local) or a long-lived browser tether

organs.name: @rapp-commons/feed_organ
organs.purpose: HTTP endpoint that serves a filtered view of events/ (e.g. /api/feed_organ/recent?kind=hello&limit=20). The browser tether currently fetches raw events/ from GitHub Pages; this organ exists for server brainstems that want a server-side filter.
